name: forge
description: Structured build and repair workflows for coding agents
_hooksNote: Codex uses the repository-root hook wrapper in ./hooks/run-hook.mjs so the packaged lifecycle map does not depend on Claude-only plugin-root variables. When a host does not fire a matching event, Forge still degrades safely: hook scripts exit 0 with { continue: true } and do not mutate state. Codex keeps the shared .forge runtime, skills, forge-status, next_action, and explicit cross-host `forge continue` surfaces, but full live hook lifecycle parity is still evidence-gated.

interface.shortDescription: Continuable build and repair harness for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Gives long-running coding work persistent project structure — phase gates, ownership tracking, and continuable state across sessions.
defaultPrompt: Start a Forge harness for this project.
Resume the shared Forge project from this host with `forge continue`.
Use Forge to diagnose and fix this repo.
